nasb.text: until we all attain to the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to a mature man, to the measure of the stature which belongs to the fullness of Christ.

esv.text: until we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to mature manhood, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ,

cnv.text: 直到我們眾人對　神的兒子都有一致的信仰和認識，可以長大成人，達到基督豐盛長成的身量；

ccb.text: 直到我们对上帝的儿子有一致的信仰和认识，逐渐成熟，达到基督那样完美的生命。

csbs.text: 直到我们大家达到在信仰上以及对神儿子真正认识上的合一，达到成熟人的地步，达到基督那丰盛完美的身量。
